title: Young People's Attachment to Home District 2000
description: The survey focused on young people's social capital and their attachment to home district. The respondents were 15-16-year-old pupils in seven different types of municipalities in Eastern Finland. Attachment to home district was investigated first. The respondents were asked where they would like to live in different stages of their lives, and to what extent certain people and issues influenced their preference of location for their working years.
